name: AgentScore
description: Alignment verification — scores how faithfully the agent followed instructions and uploads results to AgentScore dashboard

apiKey.description: API key for the AgentScore dashboard. Enables remote upload.

throttleMs.description: Minimum interval (ms) between scoring per session.

verbose.description: Include per-action match details in the report.

dashboardUrl.description: Base URL for the AgentScore API.

analysisDiscordChannelId.description: Discord channel ID to receive analysis reports. Required to enable analysis agent.

analysisHooksUrl.description: OpenClaw hooks endpoint URL. Auto-derived from gateway config if not set.

analysisHooksToken.description: OpenClaw hooks auth token. Auto-derived from hooks config if not set.
